description:
Responsibilities
1. Design, develop, optimize, and maintain backend services to ensure high availability and high
concurrency of the system.
2. Design and optimize database structures, implementing efficient data storage, query, and
caching strategies.
3. Collaborate closely with frontend teams to provide stable and efficient APIs.
4. Participate in technical discussions and code reviews, focusing on core module development,
code quality, and security.
5. Utilize common AI development tools to improve development efficiency and system
performance.
6. Deploy, maintain, and manage cloud infrastructure on Alibaba Cloud and AWS, including
monitoring and troubleshooting.
Requirements
1. Proficient in at least one backend language: PHP, Python, or Node.js.
2. Familiar with MySQL and MongoDB, including database design and optimization.
3. Strong understanding of RESTful API design and development.
4. Familiar with Linux development environments and basic server operations.
5. Experience with Alibaba Cloud or AWS deployment and maintenance.
6. Strong coding standards, logical thinking, and problem-solving skills.
Preferred Qualifications
1. Proficient in Mandarin to communicate with Mandarin-speaking clients.
2. Experience building high-concurrency or microservices systems.
3. Familiar with Docker, CI/CD, Nginx, or automated deployment processes.
